balloons.title: Balloon Pop
balloons.blurb: Pop balloons before time runs out!

help.howToPlay: Tap balloons to pop them. You have three lives and one minute. Watch out for bombs!
help.scoring: Regular, gold, and diamond balloons add points. Clock balloons add time, and heart balloons restore a life. A bomb takes away a life.
help.rewards: Reaching the pop target or a high final score grants coins and diamonds.
help.tip: Watch for special balloons - they can help you before time runs out.

bingo.title: Bingo
bingo.blurb: Play with friends in the arcade

help.howToPlay: Follow the on-screen instructions for this game.
help.tip: Take turns and have fun.

catcher.title: Catch with Leo
catcher.blurb: Catch coins and stay away from bombs!

help.howToPlay: Move Leo left and right to catch coins and diamonds falling from the sky.
help.scoring: Every coin or diamond caught adds points. Hitting a bomb ends the game.
help.rewards: The more points you earn, the more coins and diamonds you'll get for your kid world.
help.tip: Keep your eyes on what's falling and move ahead of time before the item reaches the bottom.

checkers.title: Checkers
checkers.blurb: Play with friends in the arcade

help.howToPlay: Follow the on-screen instructions for this game.
help.tip: Take turns and have fun.

chess.title: Chess
chess.blurb: Play with friends in the arcade

help.howToPlay: Follow the on-screen instructions for this game.
help.tip: Take turns and have fun.

dominoes.title: Dominoes
dominoes.blurb: Play with friends in the arcade

help.howToPlay: Follow the on-screen instructions for this game.
help.tip: Take turns and have fun.

flyer.title: Leo in a Plane
flyer.blurb: Hold to fly, collect coins, and avoid obstacles!

help.howToPlay: Hold the button or the screen to fly, and release to descend. Collect coins and avoid obstacles.
help.scoring: Coins and diamonds add points. Hitting an obstacle ends the game.
help.rewards: The farther you fly and the more points you earn, the more coins and diamonds you'll get.
help.tip: Don't fly too high - sometimes it's better to pass beneath an obstacle.

fourline.title: Four in a Row
fourline.blurb: Play with friends in the arcade

help.howToPlay: Follow the on-screen instructions for this game.
help.tip: Take turns and have fun.

fruit-slice.title: Fruit Slice
fruit-slice.blurb: Slice fruit, avoid bombs, and reach the score target!

help.howToPlay: Drag your finger across the screen to slice flying fruit. Avoid bombs - you have three mistakes allowed.
help.scoring: Every fruit sliced adds points. Slicing several fruits at once gives a combo bonus. Hitting a bomb or missing a fruit costs a mistake.
help.rewards: Reaching the score target based on difficulty level grants coins and diamonds.
help.tip: Slice only fruit - if you see a bomb, it's best to skip it.

help.howToPlay: Build trays with an equal amount of baked goods - set the number of trays and the amount per tray, then tap "Check Order".
help.scoring: Correct answer +30, time bonus up to +20, streak of 5 correct +25. No points are deducted for mistakes.
help.rewards: Coins are awarded based on how many orders you prepared correctly, accuracy, streaks, and difficulty level.
help.tip: Think about how many trays × how many per tray - not just the final result.

leo-gifts.title: Leo's Candy Shop
leo-gifts.blurb: Equal division, remainders, and quick math

help.howToPlay: Divide gifts among the children - choose how many each child gets and how many are left for Leo, then tap "Check Division".
help.scoring: Correct answer +30, time bonus up to +20, streak of 5 correct +25. No points are deducted for mistakes.
help.rewards: Coins are awarded based on how many questions you answered correctly, accuracy, streaks, and difficulty level - even if the game ended due to mistakes.
help.tip: Check that you've divided everything and that Leo isn't left with too many - you can give each child more.

leo-jump.title: Leo Jumps
leo-jump.blurb: Jump over obstacles and collect coins!

help.howToPlay: Tap to jump. Get past obstacles and collect coins, diamonds, and magnets along the way.
help.scoring: Coins and diamonds add points. Consecutive jumps over obstacles give a combo bonus. Hitting an obstacle ends the game.
help.rewards: The farther you run and the more points you earn, the more coins and diamonds you'll get.
help.tip: Don't jump every time - sometimes it's better to wait a moment and jump at the right time.

leo-lab.title: Leo's Experiment Lab
leo-lab.blurb: A game about experiments, materials, and cause and effect

help.howToPlay: Read the experiment task, choose items from the shelf (drag or tap), place them on the lab table, and tap "Check Experiment".
help.scoring: A successful experiment +30, success on the first try +10, streak of 3 correct +15, streak of 5 +30. No points are deducted for mistakes.
help.rewards: Coins are awarded based on how many experiments you succeeded at, difficulty level, accuracy, streaks, and completing 20 experiments - only if you succeeded at least once.
help.tip: Think about what's needed to complete the task - don't rely on hints on the item cards.

leo-miners.title: Leo the Miner
leo-miners.blurb: Merge mining dogs, break rocks, and earn points to redeem!

help.howToPlay: Add mining dogs to the board, drag dogs of the same level to merge them, and break rocks to earn coins and points.
help.scoring: Every rock broken grants coins. Points accumulate based on the rock's stage - with a daily limit.
help.rewards: Points can be redeemed for Leo coins and diamonds (once the server is ready).
help.tip: Upgrade DPS to break rocks faster, and GOLD to earn more coins from each rock.

help.howToPlay: Choose numbers from the path based on the task - even numbers, multiples, skip-counting, or a sequence - then tap "Check Path".
help.scoring: Correct on the first try +30, second try +20, third try +10. After 3 mistakes you move on to the next task.
help.rewards: Coins are awarded based on how many of the 20 tasks you completed, accuracy, streaks, and finishing the path.
help.tip: Pay attention to whether order matters - for skip-counting and sequences you need to choose in order.

help.howToPlay: Read the order, add toppings to the pizza slices (tap or drag), and tap "Serve Pizza".
help.scoring: Correct pizza +30, streak of 3 correct +15, streak of 5 +30. No points are deducted for mistakes.
help.rewards: Coins are awarded based on how many customers you served, accuracy, streaks, and difficulty level - even if you didn't serve all 20 customers.
help.tip: Check how many slices each topping covers - half, quarter, and eighth refer to the number of slices, not a position.

leo-supermarket.title: Leo's Grocery Store
leo-supermarket.blurb: A game about money, shopping, and giving change

help.howToPlay: A customer asks for products - pick them from the shelf, work out the change, and choose matching coins. Tap "Give Change" when you're ready.
help.scoring: Correct product +10, correct change +25, satisfied customer +30, change right on the first try +10, fast service +5. A mistake or running out of time −5.
help.rewards: Coins are awarded based on how many customers you served, accuracy, streaks, and difficulty level - even if you didn't serve all 20 customers.
help.tip: Check the purchase total and how much the customer paid - work out for yourself how much change to give back.

leo-word-detective.title: Leo's Word Detective
leo-word-detective.blurb: Drag evidence onto the board and solve reading and vocabulary cases

help.howToPlay: Drag evidence cards onto the investigation board and tap "Solve Case". When the answer is correct - the case is closed!
help.scoring: Correct answer +30, time bonus, streak of 3 +15, streak of 5 +30. Timeout −5. A mistake doesn't end the game - it just counts.
help.rewards: Coins are awarded based on how many of the 20 cases you solved, accuracy, streaks, and difficulty level.
help.tip: Read the case task carefully - on hard level there's a short passage on the board.

leo-word-train.title: Leo's Word Train
leo-word-train.blurb: Letters, words, and sentences in English - riding on the train cars

help.howToPlay: Choose a card, load it onto an empty car, and tap "Send the Train". When the answer is correct - the train departs!
help.scoring: Correct answer +30, time bonus, streak of 3 +15, streak of 5 +30. Timeout −5. A mistake doesn't end the game - it just counts.
help.rewards: Coins are awarded based on how many of the 20 tasks you completed, accuracy, streaks, and difficulty level.
help.tip: On easy - just letters. Medium - short words. Hard - short sentences.

ludo.title: Ludo
ludo.blurb: Play with friends in the arcade

help.howToPlay: Follow the on-screen instructions for this game.
help.tip: Take turns and have fun.

maze.title: Leo's Maze
maze.blurb: Find the exit of the maze before time runs out!

help.howToPlay: Move Leo through the maze, collect keys and stars, and find the exit before time runs out.
help.scoring: Keys, stars, and diamonds add points. Finishing the maze gives a big bonus. If time runs out - the game ends.
help.rewards: Successfully finishing the maze based on difficulty level grants coins, and a score bonus adds even more.
help.tip: Collect the keys first - sometimes they unlock a shorter path.

memory-match.title: Memory Match
memory-match.blurb: Flip cards, find pairs, and try to win.

help.howToPlay: Play together on the same device.

memory.title: Leo's Memory Game
memory.blurb: Flip cards and find pairs before the clock runs out!

help.howToPlay: Tap a card to flip it, and find its matching pair. Every pair you find stays open.
help.scoring: You start with a high score - the longer you take, the lower it drops. Finding all the pairs before time runs out = a win.
help.rewards: Winning based on difficulty level grants coins and diamonds. The higher the score, the bigger the reward.
help.tip: Try to remember where you saw each picture - even if you didn't find its pair right away.

picture-puzzle.title: Picture Puzzle
picture-puzzle.blurb: Complete the pieces of Leo's picture!

help.howToPlay: Drag the picture pieces to the right place on the board. Complete all the pieces before time runs out.
help.scoring: The faster you finish and the fewer moves you use, the higher the score. If time runs out before you finish - there's no win.
help.rewards: Completing the puzzle based on difficulty level grants coins, and a score bonus adds even more.
help.tip: Start with the corners and edges - it's easier to see where each piece belongs.

puzzle.title: Leo's Puzzle
puzzle.blurb: Merge tiles and rack up points before time runs out!

help.howToPlay: Move tiles on the board to merge matching numbers. The bigger the numbers, the higher the score.
help.scoring: Every merge adds points. The goal is to reach the score target before time runs out.
help.rewards: Winning based on difficulty level grants coins, and a score bonus adds even more.
help.tip: Try to keep a corner free so you have room to move tiles.

recycling-factory.title: Leo's Recycling Factory
recycling-factory.blurb: Sort trash into the right bins and help protect the environment

help.howToPlay: Drag or tap an item from the conveyor belt, then choose the correct bin. Sort enough items before you reach the maximum number of mistakes.
help.scoring: Correct sort +10, fast sort +5, streak of 5 correct +20, streak of 10 +50. A mistake or missed item −5 (score never drops below 0).
help.rewards: Coins are awarded based on how many items you sorted correctly, accuracy, streaks, and reaching the goal - even if you didn't finish the whole game.
help.tip: Pay attention to the item type - paper, plastic, glass, metal, or general waste.

help.howToPlay: Play together on the same device.

smart-blocks.title: Smart Blocks
smart-blocks.blurb: Place shapes, clear rows and columns, and reach the score target!

help.howToPlay: Drag shapes onto the board, rotate them if needed, and place them to fill rows and columns.
help.scoring: Clearing a row or column adds points. The goal is to reach the score target before the board fills up.
help.rewards: Winning based on difficulty level grants coins, and a score bonus adds even more.
help.tip: Try to clear several rows at once - it gives a lot of points.

snakes-and-ladders.title: Snakes and Ladders
snakes-and-ladders.blurb: Play with friends in the arcade

help.howToPlay: Follow the on-screen instructions for this game.
help.tip: Take turns and have fun.

sort-shapes.title: Sort Shapes
sort-shapes.blurb: Sort shapes and colors into the correct boxes!

help.howToPlay: Drag each shape to the matching box by shape or color. Finish all the sorting before time runs out.
help.scoring: Every correct sort adds points. A mistake deducts from the score. If time runs out before you finish - the game ends.
help.rewards: Finishing successfully based on difficulty level grants coins, and a score bonus adds even more.
help.tip: First decide which box each shape belongs to - then drag with confidence.

tap-battle.title: Tap Battle
tap-battle.blurb: Each side taps as fast as they can — who wins?

help.howToPlay: Play together on the same device.

target-tap.title: Target Tap
target-tap.blurb: Tap the targets before they disappear!

help.howToPlay: Tap the targets that appear on the screen before they disappear. You have three lives.
help.scoring: Regular targets, stars, and diamonds are worth different points. Missing costs a life. Consecutive hits give a combo bonus.
help.rewards: Reaching the hit target or a high final score grants coins and diamonds.
help.tip: Don't rush at everything - sometimes a target with a diamond is worth more.

tic-tac-toe.title: Tic-Tac-Toe
tic-tac-toe.blurb: Boards from 3×3 to 7×7 with score tracking.

help.howToPlay: Play together on the same device.
